data.name: xrTableCell100.ExpressionBindings
data.value: IIF(IsNullOrEmpty([RearingMaleDepl]), 0, ToDecimal([RearingMaleDepl])) + IIF(IsNullOrEmpty([RearMaleCK]), 0, ToDecimal([RearMaleCK])) + IIF(IsNullOrEmpty([RearMaleCS]), 0, ToDecimal([RearMaleCS])) + IIF(IsNullOrEmpty([RearingMaleError]), 0, ToDecimal([RearingMaleError]))

data.name: xrTableCell178.ExpressionBindings
data.value: IIF(IsNullOrEmpty([RearingMaleDepl]), 0, ToDecimal([RearingMaleDepl])) + IIF(IsNullOrEmpty([RearMaleCK]), 0, ToDecimal([RearMaleCK])) + IIF(IsNullOrEmpty([RearMaleCS]), 0, ToDecimal([RearMaleCS])) + IIF(IsNullOrEmpty([RearingMaleError]), 0, ToDecimal([RearingMaleError]))

data.name: $this.ScriptsSource
